basics.name: Xinhua Han
basics.label: Field worker
basics.summary: Interdisciplinary background in computer engineering, anthropology, and digital media. Long-term focus on the intersection of local cultures, digital technology, and everyday life. Drawn to the web of tensions between people and digital products and computational systems — translating them into narratives and strategies that product and strategy teams can act on. Fluent across in-depth interviews, participant observation, and data analysis; especially skilled at navigating the friction between user logic and product design in cross-cultural contexts.
